ideation: This animation sequence will depict a camel's gait, focusing on the characteristic two-humped motion.  Since our robot has no elbows, we'll simulate the up-and-down movement of the humps by raising and lowering the arms.  The arms will move in a slightly offset manner to represent a natural walking pattern.  The wrists will remain neutral for simplicity. Frame 1 will be a starting pose, with both arms slightly raised. Frame 2 will show the left arm higher, simulating one hump elevated. Frame 3 will shift the higher hump to the right arm. Frame 4 will return to a neutral position, and Frame 5 will show a subtle swaying motion.

frames.beat: arms lift slightly, a gentle sway begins
the left arm rises higher, like a camel's first hump
the right arm lifts, forming the second hump
both arms lower, returning to a relaxed state
a subtle rocking motion, mimicking a camel's walk
